Cities in Broward County

About Medical Care in Broward County

Broward County, Florida is home to 6864 verified medical professionals spanning 32 specialties. The county's healthcare landscape includes specialists in Internal Medicine, Family Medicine, Anesthesiology, Emergency Medicine, Psychiatry, ensuring residents have access to comprehensive medical care.

With doctors practicing in 155 cities across the county, including HOLLYWOOD, FORT LAUDERDALE, PLANTATION, patients can find quality healthcare close to home. 2073 doctors are also willing to travel, providing additional flexibility for patients with mobility challenges or those in underserved areas.

All doctors listed on EliteMD are verified through the National Provider Identifier (NPI) Registry, ensuring accurate credentials and practice information. Our directory helps patients make informed decisions when choosing a healthcare provider in Broward County.

Frequently Asked Questions

How many doctors are in Broward County, Florida?
EliteMD lists 6864 verified medical professionals across 32 specialties in Broward County, Florida. This includes specialists in Internal Medicine, Family Medicine, Anesthesiology, and more.
What are the top medical specialties in Broward County?
The most represented specialties in Broward County are Internal Medicine (1278 doctors), Family Medicine (941 doctors), Anesthesiology (607 doctors), Emergency Medicine (493 doctors), Psychiatry (484 doctors).
Which cities in Broward County have the most doctors?
The cities with the most doctors in Broward County are HOLLYWOOD (871), FORT LAUDERDALE (719), PLANTATION (594), WESTON (552), PEMBROKE PINES (549).
How are doctors in Broward County verified?
All doctors on EliteMD are verified through the National Provider Identifier (NPI) Registry, a federal database maintained by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services. Each doctor's credentials, specialty, and practice location are confirmed through official records.
Can I find a specialist who will travel to Broward County?
Yes, many specialists on EliteMD are available to travel. Use the "Will Travel" filter on the search page to find doctors willing to come to Broward County for consultations and procedures.
